rationale.R1.6: The agent significantly improved the draft by eliminating repetition and tightening phrasing, achieving a polished read.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for key figures and citations, though not comprehensively for every recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output strictly adheres to the requested scope without any deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced; potential issues were highlighted.
rationale.RX.5: Major changes are well-documented, but minor edits lack detailed traceability.
